incident_path.note: DECISION-SUPPORT ONLY — verify Art 73 notification requirements, deadlines, and the designated market-surveillance authority (MSA) for your jurisdiction against consolidated AI Act Art 73 text. Deadlines vary by incident severity.
incident_path.recommendation: Map the Art 73 serious-incident reporting path now: identify your national market-surveillance authority, determine notification deadline (verify against Art 73 text), assign internal incident-triage function.

output.logging_verdict: FAIL — no logging. Art 12 requires automatic logging of events enabling post-hoc review.

monitoring_plan_skeleton.applicable_date_note: Art 72 post-market monitoring obligations: verify target date (Digital Omnibus: 2 Dec 2027; else 2 Aug 2026) against current Official Journal status.

metrics.metric: Model accuracy on live data vs validation baseline
Adverse decision rate by demographic group

metrics.action: Art 73 notification within deadline — verify current deadline against consolidated text

metrics.threshold: Alert if intervention rate > 20% (review automation level)

monitoring_plan_skeleton.note: DECISION-SUPPORT SKELETON — not a legally-compliant Art 72 post-market monitoring plan. Review and complete with qualified compliance staff.
monitoring_plan_skeleton.responsible_function: [Assign: Model Risk / AI Governance / Chief Risk Officer]
monitoring_plan_skeleton.review_cadence: Annual full review + ad-hoc review on material change (new use case, model retrain, regulatory update)

output.note: PREPARE-AHEAD — Decision-support draft. FRIA/monitoring outputs are NOT legal assessments or compliance certificates. Complete with qualified legal and compliance staff. Verify all Art references against EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) consolidated text at https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689/oj.
output.oversight_verdict: WARNING — oversight is nominal; upgrade to meaningful review with documented escalation path (Art 14)
